item.name: Wind-up Suzaku
item.description:
Complete with her flute and her senses.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Suzaku minion.
item.tooltip:
If anyone can make Suzaku
see reason, it's you. Good luck!
   - Senri
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 110 to all enemies within range.
